title: Airports are switching from TSA to private security — see the list
excerpt: The TSA Gold+ program aims to expand the use of private contractors while retaining federal oversight. Three airports are set to participate.
content_html:
Who can forget the airport chaos that ensued during the partial government shutdown in March? Hourslong waits. Floating balloons to indicate checkpoint locations in the swelling crowds. Security lines snaking out into parking garages.

Meanwhile, the 20 airports that employ private contract screeners instead of federal workers through the Transportation Security Administration's Screening Partnership Program (SPP) largely maintained normal wait times.

As congressional budget battles have led to government shutdowns and TSA staffing shortages, a new program called TSA Gold+ seeks to expand the use of private contractors for airport security screening while maintaining direct oversight from the government agency.

TSA Gold+, a new "public-private partnership," aims to expand the Screening Partnership Program, according to TSA. Private contractors would manage both screening personnel and checkpoint technology, with TSA oversight.

A TSA spokesperson told Business Insider that TSA Gold+ "presents a new way for airports to deliver exceptional service to every traveler, while advancing security, efficiency, and the overall airport experience."

TSA plans to launch Gold+ at three US airports next year. They are:

  • Des Moines International Airport (Iowa)
  • Charleston International Airport (South Carolina)
  • Tampa International Airport (Florida)

The New York Times reported that Des Moines will transition to TSA Gold+ in January 2027, followed by Charleston in February 2027 and Tampa in May 2027.

The American Federation of Government Employees, the union representing 47,000 Transportation Security Officers at 400 airports, criticized the Trump administration's push for privatization, saying in a statement that the move "ignores lessons learned from the September 11 attacks and other airline tragedies."

"The administration's actions should concern all Americans, and AFGE will continue to speak out against any proposal that threatens our members' jobs and jeopardizes the safety of the flying public," AFGE National President Everett Kelley said.

These 3 airports join a longer list of US airports with private security

Although the three airports would be the first to participate in Gold+, they are not the first to rely on private screeners. The 20 airports that participate in SPP, using contractors rather than federally employed TSA agents, are:

  • Atlantic City International Airport (New Jersey)
  • Charles M. Schulz—Sonoma County Airport (California)
  • Dawson Community Airport (Montana)
  • Great Falls International Airport (Montana)
  • Glacier Park International Airport (Montana)
  • Frederick Douglass Greater Rochester International Airport (New York)
  • Havre City-County Airport (Montana)
  • Kansas City International Airport (Missouri)
  • L. M. Clayton Airport (Montana)
  • Orlando Sanford International Airport (Florida)
  • Portsmouth International Airport (New Hampshire)
  • Punta Gorda Airport (Florida)
  • Roswell Air Center (New Mexico)
  • San Francisco International Airport (California)
  • Sarasota-Bradenton International Airport (Florida)
  • Sidney-Richland Municipal Airport (Montana)
  • Sioux Falls Regional Airport (South Dakota)
  • Tupelo Regional Airport (Mississippi)
  • Wokal Field/Glasgow International Airport (Montana)
  • Yellowstone Airport (Montana)

Update: July 23, 2026 — This story has been updated to include a statement from TSA.

sentences.en: US airports experienced longer security wait times when Transportation Security Administration officers missed paychecks during the government shutdown in March.
sentences.zh: 三月份政府关门期间，由于运输安全管理局官员未能领到工资，美国机场经历了更长的安检等待时间。

sentences.en: Mark Felix/Bloomberg via Getty Images
sentences.zh: 马克·菲利克斯/彭博社，盖蒂图片社

blocks.html_en: Who can forget the airport chaos that ensued during the partial government shutdown in March? Hourslong waits. Floating balloons to indicate checkpoint locations in the swelling crowds. Security lines snaking out into parking garages.

sentences.en: Who can forget the airport chaos that ensued during the partial government shutdown in March?
sentences.zh: 谁能忘记三月份政府部分关闭期间引发的机场混乱？

sentences.en: Hourslong waits.
sentences.zh: 长达数小时的等待。

sentences.en: Floating balloons to indicate checkpoint locations in the swelling crowds.
sentences.zh: 漂浮的气球在拥挤的人群中指示检查站的位置。

sentences.en: Security lines snaking out into parking garages.
sentences.zh: 安全线蜿蜒延伸至停车场。

blocks.html_en: Meanwhile, the 20 airports that employ private contract screeners instead of federal workers through the Transportation Security Administration's Screening Partnership Program (SPP) largely maintained normal wait times.

sentences.en: Meanwhile, the 20 airports that employ private contract screeners instead of federal workers through the Transportation Security Administration's Screening Partnership Program (SPP) largely maintained normal wait times.
sentences.zh: 与此同时，通过运输安全管理局的安检合作计划（SPP）雇用私人合同安检员而不是联邦工作人员的 20 个机场基本上维持了正常的等待时间。

blocks.html_en: As congressional budget battles have led to government shutdowns and TSA staffing shortages, a new program called TSA Gold+ seeks to expand the use of private contractors for airport security screening while maintaining direct oversight from the government agency.

sentences.en: As congressional budget battles have led to government shutdowns and TSA staffing shortages, a new program called TSA Gold+ seeks to expand the use of private contractors for airport security screening while maintaining direct oversight from the government agency.
sentences.zh: 由于国会预算之争导致政府关门和 TSA 人员短缺，一项名为 TSA Gold+ 的新计划旨在扩大使用私人承包商进行机场安检，同时保持政府机构的直接监督。

blocks.html_en: TSA Gold+, a new "public-private partnership," aims to expand the Screening Partnership Program, according to TSA. Private contractors would manage both screening personnel and checkpoint technology, with TSA oversight.

sentences.en: TSA Gold+, a new "public-private partnership," aims to expand the Screening Partnership Program, according to TSA.
sentences.zh: 据 TSA 称，TSA Gold+ 是一项新的“公私合作伙伴关系”，旨在扩大筛查合作伙伴计划。

sentences.en: Private contractors would manage both screening personnel and checkpoint technology, with TSA oversight.
sentences.zh: 私人承包商将在运输安全管理局的监督下管理安检人员和检查站技术。

blocks.html_en: A TSA spokesperson told Business Insider that TSA Gold+ "presents a new way for airports to deliver exceptional service to every traveler, while advancing security, efficiency, and the overall airport experience."

sentences.en: A TSA spokesperson told Business Insider that TSA Gold+ "presents a new way for airports to deliver exceptional service to every traveler, while advancing security, efficiency, and the overall airport experience."
sentences.zh: TSA 发言人告诉《商业内幕》，TSA Gold+“为机场提供了一种新方式，为每位旅客提供卓越的服务，同时提高安全性、效率和整体机场体验。”

sentences.en: Travelers waited in long TSA lines due to staffing shortages during the government shutdown.
sentences.zh: 由于政府关门期间人员短缺，旅客在美国运输安全管理局 (TSA) 中排起了长队等候。

sentences.en: Mark Felix/Bloomberg via Getty Images
sentences.zh: 马克·菲利克斯/彭博社，盖蒂图片社

blocks.html_en: TSA plans to launch Gold+ at three US airports next year. They are:

sentences.en: TSA plans to launch Gold+ at three US airports next year.
sentences.zh: TSA 计划明年在美国三个机场推出 Gold+。

sentences.en: They are:
sentences.zh: 他们是：

blocks.html_en: • Des Moines International Airport (Iowa)

sentences.en: Des Moines International Airport (Iowa)
sentences.zh: 得梅因国际机场（爱荷华州）

blocks.html_en: • Charleston International Airport (South Carolina)

sentences.en: Charleston International Airport (South Carolina)
sentences.zh: 查尔斯顿国际机场（南卡罗来纳州）

blocks.html_en: • Tampa International Airport (Florida)

sentences.en: Tampa International Airport (Florida)
sentences.zh: 坦帕国际机场（佛罗里达州）

blocks.html_en: The New York Times reported that Des Moines will transition to TSA Gold+ in January 2027, followed by Charleston in February 2027 and Tampa in May 2027.

sentences.en: The New York Times reported that Des Moines will transition to TSA Gold+ in January 2027, followed by Charleston in February 2027 and Tampa in May 2027.
sentences.zh: 据《纽约时报》报道，得梅因将于 2027 年 1 月过渡到 TSA Gold+，查尔斯顿将于 2027 年 2 月过渡，坦帕将于 2027 年 5 月过渡。

blocks.html_en: The American Federation of Government Employees, the union representing 47,000 Transportation Security Officers at 400 airports, criticized the Trump administration's push for privatization, saying in a statement that the move "ignores lessons learned from the September 11 attacks and other airline tragedies."

sentences.en: The American Federation of Government Employees, the union representing 47,000 Transportation Security Officers at 400 airports, criticized the Trump administration's push for privatization, saying in a statement that the move "ignores lessons learned from the September 11 attacks and other airline tragedies."
sentences.zh: 代表 400 个机场 47,000 名运输安全官员的美国政府雇员联合会批评特朗普政府推动私有化，在一份声明中表示，此举“忽视了从 9 月 11 日袭击和其他航空公司悲剧中吸取的教训”。

blocks.html_en: "The administration's actions should concern all Americans, and AFGE will continue to speak out against any proposal that threatens our members' jobs and jeopardizes the safety of the flying public," AFGE National President Everett Kelley said.

sentences.en: "The administration's actions should concern all Americans, and AFGE will continue to speak out against any proposal that threatens our members' jobs and jeopardizes the safety of the flying public," AFGE National President Everett Kelley said.
sentences.zh: AFGE 全国主席埃弗雷特·凯利 (Everett Kelley) 表示：“政府的行动应该引起所有美国人的关注，AFGE 将继续公开反对任何威胁我们会员工作并危及飞行公众安全的提议。”

sentences.zh: 尽管这三个机场将是第一个参与 Gold+ 的机场，但它们并不是第一个依赖私人安检员的机场。

blocks.html_en: • I visited the largest military aviation museum in the world with over 350 aircraft and missiles on display. Here are the coolest things I saw.

sentences.en: I visited the largest military aviation museum in the world with over 350 aircraft and missiles on display.
sentences.zh: 我参观了世界上最大的军事航空博物馆，展出了350多架飞机和导弹。

sentences.en: Here are the coolest things I saw.
sentences.zh: 这是我看到的最酷的事情。

blocks.html_en: • I spent the night on a World War II submarine Airbnb that can sleep 65 people in sailors' bunks. Take a look inside.

sentences.en: I spent the night on a World War II submarine Airbnb that can sleep 65 people in sailors' bunks.
sentences.zh: 我在 Airbnb 的一艘二战潜艇上过夜，它的水手铺位可容纳 65 人。

sentences.en: Take a look inside.
sentences.zh: 看看里面。

blocks.html_en: • This 27-room Gilded Age mansion is more than just a display of wealth and power. Take a look inside Ballantine House.

sentences.en: This 27-room Gilded Age mansion is more than just a display of wealth and power.
sentences.zh: 这座拥有 27 个房间的镀金时代豪宅不仅仅是财富和权力的展示。

sentences.en: Take a look inside Ballantine House.
sentences.zh: 看看百龄坛屋的内部。

blocks.html_en: Human interest:

sentences.en: Human interest:
sentences.zh: 人文关怀：

blocks.html_en: • Iceland only has one rabbi. In a world filled with hate, he leads with kindness.

sentences.en: Iceland only has one rabbi.
sentences.zh: 冰岛只有一名拉比。

sentences.en: In a world filled with hate, he leads with kindness.
sentences.zh: 在一个充满仇恨的世界里，他以仁慈领导。

blocks.html_en: • Inside the Post-Roe Future: Thirteen conversations from the front lines

sentences.en: Inside the Post-Roe Future: Thirteen conversations from the front lines
sentences.zh: 后罗伊时代的未来：来自前线的十三次对话

blocks.html_en: • Airlines break thousands of wheelchairs per year, leaving disabled passengers stranded. Activists and politicians are fighting for change.

sentences.en: Airlines break thousands of wheelchairs per year, leaving disabled passengers stranded.
sentences.zh: 航空公司每年都会损坏数千个轮椅，导致残疾乘客滞留。

sentences.en: Activists and politicians are fighting for change.
sentences.zh: 活动家和政治家正在为变革而奋斗。

blocks.html_en: • A Palestinian restaurant in New York hosted a free Shabbat dinner. Over 1,300 people showed up.

sentences.en: A Palestinian restaurant in New York hosted a free Shabbat dinner.
sentences.zh: 纽约一家巴勒斯坦餐厅举办了免费的安息日晚餐。

sentences.en: Over 1,300 people showed up.
sentences.zh: 超过 1,300 人出席。

blocks.html_en: • Airports

sentences.en: Airports
sentences.zh: 机场

content_html_zh:
谁能忘记三月份政府部分关闭期间引发的机场混乱？ 长达数小时的等待。 漂浮的气球在拥挤的人群中指示检查站的位置。 安全线蜿蜒延伸至停车场。

与此同时，通过运输安全管理局的安检合作计划（SPP）雇用私人合同安检员而不是联邦工作人员的 20 个机场基本上维持了正常的等待时间。

由于国会预算之争导致政府关门和 TSA 人员短缺，一项名为 TSA Gold+ 的新计划旨在扩大使用私人承包商进行机场安检，同时保持政府机构的直接监督。

据 TSA 称，TSA Gold+ 是一项新的“公私合作伙伴关系”，旨在扩大筛查合作伙伴计划。 私人承包商将在运输安全管理局的监督下管理安检人员和检查站技术。

TSA 发言人告诉《商业内幕》，TSA Gold+“为机场提供了一种新方式，为每位旅客提供卓越的服务，同时提高安全性、效率和整体机场体验。”

TSA 计划明年在美国三个机场推出 Gold+。 他们是：

  • 得梅因国际机场（爱荷华州）
  • 查尔斯顿国际机场（南卡罗来纳州）
  • 坦帕国际机场（佛罗里达州）

据《纽约时报》报道，得梅因将于 2027 年 1 月过渡到 TSA Gold+，查尔斯顿将于 2027 年 2 月过渡，坦帕将于 2027 年 5 月过渡。

代表 400 个机场 47,000 名运输安全官员的美国政府雇员联合会批评特朗普政府推动私有化，在一份声明中表示，此举“忽视了从 9 月 11 日袭击和其他航空公司悲剧中吸取的教训”。

AFGE 全国主席埃弗雷特·凯利 (Everett Kelley) 表示：“政府的行动应该引起所有美国人的关注，AFGE 将继续公开反对任何威胁我们会员工作并危及飞行公众安全的提议。”

这 3 个机场加入了美国拥有私人保安的机场名单

尽管这三个机场将是第一个参与 Gold+ 的机场，但它们并不是第一个依赖私人安检员的机场。 参与 SPP（使用承包商而不是联邦雇用的 TSA 代理）的 20 个机场是：

  • 大西洋城国际机场（新泽西州）
  • 查尔斯·M. 舒尔茨—索诺玛县机场（加利福尼亚州）
  • 道森社区机场（蒙大拿州）
  • 大瀑布城国际机场（蒙大拿州）
  • 冰川公园国际机场（蒙大拿州）
  • 弗雷德里克·道格拉斯大罗切斯特国际机场（纽约）
  • 哈佛市县机场 (蒙大拿州)
  • 堪萨斯城国际机场（密苏里州）
  • L。 M。 克莱顿机场 (蒙大拿州)
  • 奥兰多桑福德国际机场（佛罗里达州）
  • 朴茨茅斯国际机场（新罕布什尔州）
  • 蓬塔戈尔达机场（佛罗里达）
  • 罗斯威尔航空中心（新墨西哥州）
  • 旧金山国际机场（加利福尼亚州）
  • 萨拉索塔-布雷登顿国际机场（佛罗里达）
  • 悉尼-里奇兰市机场（蒙大拿）
  • 苏福尔斯地区机场（南达科他州）
  • 图珀洛地区机场（密西西比州）
  • 沃卡尔机场/格拉斯哥国际机场（蒙大拿州）
  • 黄石机场（蒙大拿州）

更新：2026 年 7 月 23 日 — 此报道已更新，包含 TSA 的声明。

Talia Lakritz 您目前正在关注该作者！ 想要取消关注吗？ 通过电子邮件中的链接取消订阅。

Talia Lakritz 是《商业内幕》的《生活》记者，通过生活方式和视觉叙事镜头报道政治和权力。 她曾在白宫以及全国各地的军事设施、豪宅和博物馆进行报道，通过身临其境的方式让读者了解影响美国生活的人物、地点和系统。此前，她为《纽约犹太周》和 SciShow Space 撰稿。塔莉亚拥有哥伦比亚大学巴纳德学院的英语学士学位，主修创意写作，并被任命为同一个精神学习联盟的跨宗教牧师。 她希望有一天能够参观所有 50 个州和所有 14 个公共总统图书馆。可以在 LinkedIn、Instagram 和 X 上找到 Talia。政治与权力：

  • 前后照片显示特朗普迄今为止对白宫装饰所做的改变
  • 梅拉尼娅·特朗普一直保持低调。 她的服装很有帮助。
  • 梅拉尼娅·特朗普的白宫肖像摄影师表示，这张照片“展示了一位准备接受自己立场的女性”
  • 中西部正在经历一个时刻

视觉特征：

  • 在美国潜艇击沉伊朗军舰后，二战博物馆的船只突然感觉不再像历史了
  • 我参观了世界上最大的军事航空博物馆，展出了350多架飞机和导弹。 这是我看到的最酷的事情。

  • 这座拥有 27 个房间的镀金时代豪宅不仅仅是财富和权力的展示。 看看百龄坛屋的内部。
